text:
[
  {
    "thinking": "The video begins on the 'Studies' dashboard of the Askable application. I am recording the initial state as required.",
    "type": "change_ui_state",
    "time_start_ms": 0,
    "time_end_ms": 0,
    "description": "Initial screen state: The 'Studies' page is visible, displaying a table of existing research studies with columns for Title, Type, Status, Quota, and dates.",
    "confidence": 1.0,
    "page_title": "Studies",
    "page_location": "https://app.askable.com/studies",
    "frame_description": "Dashboard view showing a table of research studies."
  },
  {
    "thinking": "The user clicks the orange '+ Create' button in the top right corner to initiate the creation of a new study. I observed the cursor move to the button and a click indicator appear.",
    "type": "click",
    "time_start_ms": 1950,
    "time_end_ms": 1950,
    "description": "User clicks the '+ Create' button.",
    "confidence": 1.0,
    "interaction_target": "+ Create",
    "page_title": "Studies",
    "page_location": "https://app.askable.com/studies",
    "frame_description": "The user clicks the '+ Create' button in the top right corner."
  },
  {
    "thinking": "Immediately after clicking '+ Create', a dropdown menu appears containing various study types. This is a side effect of the click.",
    "type": "change_ui_state",
    "time_start_ms": 1950,
    "time_end_ms": 2100,
    "description": "A dropdown menu appears below the '+ Create' button with options like 'Interview study' and 'Project delivery'.",
    "confidence": 1.0,
    "frame_description": "A dropdown menu is now visible over the studies list."
  },
  {
    "thinking": "The user hovers the cursor over the 'Interview study' option in the dropdown menu for a significant amount of time (over 50 seconds) before clicking it, suggesting they are reading or considering their choice.",
    "type": "hover",
    "time_start_ms": 2100,
    "time_end_ms": 52750,
    "description": "User hovers over the 'Interview study' option in the dropdown menu.",
    "confidence": 0.9,
    "interaction_target": "Interview study",
    "frame_description": "The cursor lingers over the 'Interview study' option in the open dropdown menu."
  },
  {
    "thinking": "The user clicks on 'Interview study' to proceed with creating that specific type of research project.",
    "type": "click",
    "time_start_ms": 52750,
    "time_end_ms": 52750,
    "description": "User selects 'Interview study' from the dropdown menu.",
    "confidence": 1.0,
    "interaction_target": "Interview study",
    "frame_description": "The user clicks the 'Interview study' menu item."
  },
  {
    "thinking": "Following the click, the application navigates to the study setup wizard. I see the URL change and the page content transition.",
    "type": "navigate",
    "time_start_ms": 52750,
    "time_end_ms": 53550,
    "description": "The page navigates to the study creation setup wizard.",
    "confidence": 1.0,
    "page_title": "Studies | Askable",
    "page_location": "https://app.askable.com/booking-setup/create?research-type=remote-call",
    "frame_description": "The screen transitions from the studies list to the first step of the study setup wizard."
  },
  {
    "thinking": "The first step of the study setup, 'Study title', is now fully loaded and interactive.",
    "type": "change_ui_state",
    "time_start_ms": 53550,
    "time_end_ms": 53550,
    "description": "The 'Study title' setup page is fully loaded, showing a pre-populated input field.",
    "confidence": 1.0,
    "frame_description": "The study setup interface is visible, focused on the 'Study title' step."
  },
  {
    "thinking": "The user hovers over the 'Study title' input field for several seconds before interacting with it.",
    "type": "hover",
    "time_start_ms": 54550,
    "time_end_ms": 65450,
    "description": "User hovers over the 'Study title' input field.",
    "confidence": 0.9,
    "interaction_target": "Study title",
    "frame_description": "The cursor is positioned over the study title text input."
  },
  {
    "thinking": "The user replaces the pre-populated text with a custom title. I see the characters being typed into the field.",
    "type": "input_text",
    "time_start_ms": 65450,
    "time_end_ms": 72750,
    "description": "User types 'TV Streaming - Discovery' into the study title input field.",
    "confidence": 1.0,
    "interaction_target": "Study title",
    "frame_description": "The user enters the text 'TV Streaming - Discovery' into the input field."
  },
  {
    "thinking": "After typing the title, the user moves the cursor to the 'Next' button and pauses briefly before clicking.",
    "type": "hover",
    "time_start_ms": 75750,
    "time_end_ms": 77450,
    "description": "User hovers over the 'Next' button.",
    "confidence": 0.9,
    "interaction_target": "Next",
    "frame_description": "The cursor is over the black 'Next' button."
  },
  {
    "thinking": "The user clicks the 'Next' button to move to the next step of the setup process.",
    "type": "click",
    "time_start_ms": 77450,
    "time_end_ms": 77450,
    "description": "User clicks the 'Next' button.",
    "confidence": 1.0,
    "interaction_target": "Next",
    "frame_description": "The user clicks the 'Next' button."
  },
  {
    "thinking": "A loading spinner appears briefly, and then the UI updates to show the next step of the wizard: 'How will you be conducting your research?'.",
    "type": "change_ui_state",
    "time_start_ms": 77450,
    "time_end_ms": 78894,
    "description": "A loading spinner appears and then the page updates to the 'Research method' step of the setup.",
    "confidence": 1.0,
    "page_location": "https://app.askable.com/booking-setup/create?research-type=null",
    "frame_description": "The UI transitions to show the research method selection screen."
  }
